commands.review_summary:
This PR changes `sessions.usage` omitted-agent handling to search all configured agents, adds `usageAgentId` request state plus a Usage-page agent selector, and updates focused tests/i18n.

PR surface: Source +36, Tests +3. Total +39 across 9 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Current source shows the Web UI `loadUsage` request omits `agentId` while current main's backend defaults omitted `agentId` to the default agent, so non-main rows are source-reproducible without running a live setup.
commands.review_followup: Needs contributor real behavior proof and maintainer judgment on the backend data-scope change before repair or merge automation would be safe.

target.title: fix(gateway): restore all-agent session discovery in sessions.usage when no agentId is provided
target.body:
## Summary

- Backend: when no `agentId` is provided in `sessions.usage` requests, discover sessions across all configured agents instead of defaulting to "main"
- Frontend: add `usageAgentId` state and agent selector dropdown to the usage page so operators can optionally scope usage queries to a specific agent
- Fixes the Web UI usage page agent filter that was broken since v2026.5.17 (commit 6a12c6f79915 / PR #81386)

## Behavior addressed

The v2026.5.17 fix scoped `sessions.usage` lookups by `agentId`, defaulting to "main" when no `agentId` was specified. The Web UI frontend never sent `agentId` in API requests, so non-main agent sessions were never returned, and the client-side agent filter popover only saw main sessions.

## Verification

- [x] Backend: `pnpm test src/gateway/server-methods/usage.sessions-usage.test.ts` — 15/15 pass
- [x] Backend: `pnpm test src/gateway/server-methods/usage.test.ts` — 12/12 pass
- [x] Backend: `pnpm test src/gateway/server-methods/usage.cost-usage-cache.test.ts` — 2/2 pass
- [x] Frontend: `pnpm test ui/src/ui/controllers/usage.node.test.ts` — 9/9 pass
- [x] Frontend: `pnpm test ui/src/ui/views/usage.test.ts` — 1/1 pass
- [x] Frontend: `pnpm test ui/src/ui/app-settings.refresh-active-tab.node.test.ts` — 23/23 pass

Fixes #87132

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
